title: Semantic Search: Finding Deep Connections
overview: A multi-layered search engine that uses full-text indexing (FTS5) to find connections across languages, people, and deep narrative profiles.
historical_context: Implemented to allow researchers to find "hidden" mentions of concepts within the vast narrative documentation of the Atlas.
mental_model: A global index that understands categories (language, profile, concept) and provides contextual snippets.
tradeoffs: Requires manual indexing and schema management to ensure all narrative content is searchable.
legacy: Transforms the Atlas from a list of files into a searchable research platform.
ai_assisted_discovery_missions: Analyze the SQLite FTS5 implementation used in the Atlas.
Explain how BM25 ranking improves search relevance.
